response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but primarily in languages and frameworks outside the core requirements of C++ and industrial automation (e.g., TypeScript, Node.js, DLang). While they have some C/C++ experience (LabWindows/CVI), it is dated and not aligned with modern C++ practices or the specific needs of the role, such as secure industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1) or high-performance networking/multi-threading systems. Their background in web and mobile development does not directly translate to the industrial automation or cloud-platform solutions required for this role.
strengths: Strong background in software development across multiple languages and paradigms
Experience with performance optimization and low-latency applications (e.g., fibers, async I/O)
Proven ability to mentor teams and organize technical workshops
concerns: Limited to no recent or in-depth experience with C++ and STL for high-performance systems
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle (SDL)
Lacks experience with message brokers, REST/MQTT protocols, or IoT/industrial automation systems
